history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot of a young man with dark, tousled hair, wearing a black t-shirt. He is looking slightly to the side with a gentle expression. Sunlight dramatically cuts across his face, illuminating one side of his features while leaving the other in deep shadow. The lighting creates a strong contrast, highlighting the contours of his cheekbone, nose, and lips. The background is dark and indistinct, with a hint of a vertical line and a textured surface on the right side, suggesting an indoor setting. The overall mood is serene and contemplative, with a touch of mystery due to the dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. The color palette is dominated by dark tones with the warm glow of sunlight on the skin.
